ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "nuc_power1" INTEGER /* Indicator for the first nuclear power strategy */,
  "nuc_power2" INTEGER /* Indicator for the second nuclear power strategy */,
  "co2_price" REAL /* Current price of CO2 emissions */,
  "ban_fuel_explore1" INTEGER /* Indicator for the first fuel ban exploration scenario */,
  "ban_fuel_explore2" INTEGER /* Indicator for the second fuel ban exploration scenario */,
  "renewable_energy_source" TEXT /* Type of renewable energy source used */,
  "fossil_fuel_source" TEXT /* Type of fossil fuel source used */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of energy production */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Link to the location of energy production */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_production_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_standards" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory standard */,
  "rfs1" INTEGER /* Indicator for the first RFS standard */,
  "rfs2" INTEGER /* Indicator for the second RFS standard */,
  "standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory standard */,
  "standard_description" TEXT /* Description of the regulatory standard */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the standard becomes effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utility_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost record */,
  "utility_p1" REAL /* Cost associated with the first utility strategy */,
  "utility_p2" REAL /* Cost associated with the second utility strategy */,
  "utility_p3" REAL /* Cost associated with the third utility strategy */,
  "utility_p4" REAL /* Cost associated with the fourth utility strategy */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date of cost calculation */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Link to the location of cost calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utility_costs_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "group_score" REAL /* The score of the group based on various metrics */,
  "group_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the group score */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Link to the scenario being analyzed */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date the statistics were calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_statistics_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predicted_outcomes" (
  "pred_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "predicted_probability" REAL /* Predicted probability of a certain outcome occurring */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Link to the scenario being analyzed */,
  "model_used" TEXT /* Name of the model used for prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pred_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predicted_outcomes_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predicted_outcomes_model_used FOREIGN KEY ("model_used") REFERENCES models ("model_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Link to the energy production record involved */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Link to the regulatory standard applicable */,
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Link to the utility cost record applicable */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Link to the group statistics record applicable */,
  "pred_id" INTEGER /* Link to the predicted outcomes record applicable */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "scenario_description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_production_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_id") REFERENCES energy_production ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES group_statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulatory_standards ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_pred_id FOREIGN KEY ("pred_id") REFERENCES predicted_outcomes ("pred_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_cost_id FOREIGN KEY ("cost_id") REFERENCES utility_costs ("cost_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Link to the scenario being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_analysis_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., city, state, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of energy provider (e.g., utility company, renewable energy provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)
